channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The escalating U.S.âIran war is rewriting the CEO playbook again
item.description: Also includes all the latest news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Ships go dark as the clock runs out on Trumpâs âundeclared naval warâ in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Essential morning briefing before you start your workday.

item.title: Why corporate strategy is moving to the CFOâs office
item.description: At a recent McKinsey forum, most CFOs reported that the strategy function now reports to them.

item.title: Valarian secures $50 million to help governments and enterprises reduce reliance on US cloud services
item.description: A former Palantir executive co-founded the London startup that creates a software layer between governments and their AI.
